entries.summary: 1922 printing; author Annie Besant died 1933. Wikisource marks public domain in US (pre-1931 publication) and life+92 in many jurisdictions.
entries.jurisdiction_note: Always verify for your distribution countries; this project does not offer legal advice.

entries.summary: 1909 edition commonly treated as public domain in the US due to age of publication.
entries.jurisdiction_note: Verify for commercial use outside the US.

entries.summary: Project Gutenberg ebook 2388; follow Gutenberg terms for redistribution of headers and license notices if required.
entries.jurisdiction_note: Gutenberg blocks some countries; verify eligibility.

entries.summary: Ganguli translation (late 19th century) widely cited as US public domain.
entries.jurisdiction_note: Verify jurisdiction; do not mix in modern copyrighted footnotes or introductions from third parties.

entries.summary: Digitization of Ganguli English prose; treat as derivative of public-domain translation; follow upstream LICENSE.
entries.jurisdiction_note: Check AASI repository LICENSE file when shipping commercially.

entries.summary: Not ingested in v1. Any future use requires explicit permission and citation rules from the rights holder / host.
